params._goodid1: The ID of the first good
params._goodid2: The ID of the second good
params._referral: when side is buy, _referral is the referral address when side is sell, _referral is the address to receive the fee
params._swapQuantity: The amount of _goodid1 to swap        - amount0: The quantity of the input good        - amount1: The minimum gross quantity of the output good before any relayer execution fee
params._trader: The trader; `msg.sender` may be a relayer distinct from `_trader` when `signature` is valid.
params.data: Encoded transfer authorization for the input token (Permit/Transfer).
params.deadline: Unix timestamp; if non-zero and expired, reverts. Bound in EIP-712 struct; `0` means no expiry check on-chain.
params.signature: EIP-712 signature over the buy payload; **verified** when `msg.sender != _trader`.
Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.

params.good: The address of the good to query

returns._0: goodstate The current state of the good,  goodConfig Configuration of the good, check goodconfig.sol or whitepaper for details  owner Creator of the good  currentState Present investQuantity, CurrentQuantity  investState Shares, value

params.proofid: The ID of the proof to query

returns._0: proofstate The current state of the proof,  currentgood The current good associated with the proof  valuegood The value good associated with the proof  shares normal good shares, value good shares  state Total value, Total actual value  invest normal good virtual quantity, normal good actual quantity  valueinvest value good virtual quantity, value good actual quantity

getRecentGoodState(address,address).details: Retrieves the current state of two goods in a single call

params.good1: The address of the first good to query
params.good2: The address of the second good to query

returns.good1correntstate: The current state of the first good, representing its latest trading iteration,amount0:good current value,amount1:good current quantity
returns.good2correntstate: The current state of the second good, representing its latest trading iteration,amount0:good current value,amount1:good current quantity

params.signature: Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.

params._erc20address: The contract address of the good
params._initial: Initial parameters (amount0: normal good quantity, amount1: value good quantity)
params._valuegood: The ID of the value good used to measure the normal good's value

params._erc20address: The address of the ERC20 token representing the new good
params._goodConfig: The good configuration settings (fees, limits, etc.)
params._initial: amount0: user-specified total value, amount1: token quantity to deposit
params._normaldata: The data for transferring the normal good (Permit/Transfer)
params.signature: Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.

params._erc20address: The contract address of the good
params._initial: Initial parameters for the good (amount0: value, amount1: quantity)

params._quantity: Quantity of normal good to invest
params._togood: ID of the normal good to invest in

params.goodid: ID of the good to check

returns._0: Whether the good's price is higher

params.signature: Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.
Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.
Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.

oneTokenInvest(address,uint256,bytes,byt.details: The caller deposits only the target token; its credited value is derived from      the current pool price and scaled by the leverage factor (`enpower`).      Flow: checkInvest (price guard) → transfer tokens in → compute virtual shares      → update good state → update/create proof → stake value to TTS.      Reverts with TTSwapError(47) if the deposit price exceeds the current pool price,      TTSwapError(38) if the resulting investment value is below the dust threshold.

params._gooddata: Encoded transfer authorisation (plain approve / EIP-2612 / Permit2).
params._goodid: Address of the ERC-20 token (good) to invest in.
params._invest: Packed uint256 — amount0: credited value per unit, amount1: token quantity to deposit.
params.signature: Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here (C-01 scheme B).

params._recipient: Address receiving output good. In relayer mode, net delivery may be lower because execution fee is deducted from gross output.
params._swapQuantity: Packed swap params:        - amount0: max input limit.        - amount1: target gross output amount before any relayer execution fee.
params._trader: The trader; `msg.sender` may be a relayer distinct from `_trader` when `signature` is valid.
params.data: Additional transfer data for input token (Permit/Transfer).
params.external_info: External business metadata (e.g., payment order id or other extra info).
params.signature: EIP-712 signature over the pay payload; **verified** when `msg.sender != _trader`.

queryCommission(address[],address).custom:security: Reverts if more than 100 goods are queriedView function, does not modify state
queryCommission(address[],address).details: Queries commission amounts for multiple goods for a specific recipient

params._goodid: Array of good addresses to query commission for
params._recipient: The address to check commission amounts for

returns._0: feeamount Array of commission amounts corresponding to each good

params.signature: Reserved for ABI compatibility; **not verified** here.

cancelNonce().notice: Allows users to proactively increment the nonce to invalidate previously signed offline代付 signatures

changeGoodOwner(address,address,address,.notice: Changes the owner of a good

getGoodState(address).notice: Retrieves the current state of a good

getProofState(uint256).notice: Retrieves the current state of a proof

getRecentGoodState(address,address).notice: Retrieves the current state of two goods in a single call

initGood(address,uint256,address,uint256.notice: Initialize a normal good in the market

initGoodWithPrice(address,uint256,uint25.notice: Initialize a new good with single-token deposit at a user-specified price

initMetaGood(address,uint256,uint256,byt.notice: Initialize the first good in the market

ishigher(address,address,uint256).notice: Check if the price of a good is higher than a comparison price

modifyGoodConfig(address,uint256,address.notice: Allows market admin to modify a good's attributes

oneTokenInvest(address,uint256,bytes,byt.notice: Add single-token liquidity to an existing good without pairing a value good.

payGood(address,address,uint256,address,.notice: Pays a fixed gross output amount using inverse pricing.

queryCommission(address[],address).notice: This function: - Returns commission amounts for up to 100 goods in a single call - Each amount represents the commission available for the recipient - Returns 0 for goods where no commission is available - Maintains gas efficiency by using a fixed array size

refreshPromise(uint256).notice: Signal for claimable proof on applied goods; **only** `msg.sender` as proof owner (no relayer, no EIP-712). See C-01 / M-08.
